ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "size_code" TEXT /* Code for the clothing size (e.g., 0, 2, 4/6, 8/10, 12/14) */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement range for the clothing size */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement range for the clothing size */,
  "hips" TEXT /* Hips measurement range for the clothing size */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder measurement range for the clothing size */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement range for the clothing size */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_measurements" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "bust" INTEGER /* Bust measurement of the customer */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement of the customer */,
  "hips" INTEGER /* Hips measurement of the customer */,
  "shoulder" INTEGER /* Shoulder measurement of the customer */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement of the customer */,
  "preferred_measurement_unit" TEXT /* Preferred unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred clothing size for the customer */,
  "preferred_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred clothing category for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_measurements_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category (e.g., Women's Tops, Men's Bottoms) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Paid, Pending, Failed) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_measurements ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product at the time of the order */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing size for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was processed */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment transaction (e.g., Success, Failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_transactions_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "preferred_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred clothing size */,
  "preferred_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred clothing category */,
  "preferred_payment_method" TEXT /* Preferred payment method (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "preferred_shipping_method" TEXT /* Preferred shipping method (e.g., Standard, Express) */,
  "last_order_date" TEXT /* Date of the last order placed */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_preferred_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customer_measurements ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_preferred_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_size_id") REFERENCES clothing_sizes ("size_id")
)
